name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Carrollton's Loanstar Title Loans at 2000 E Belt Line Rd offers quick title loans and cash advances to residents.
description_long:
Loanstar Title Loans' Carrollton, TX location is situated at 2000 E Belt Line Rd, a convenient spot for residents in the Carrollton area. The storefront operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with extended Saturday hours from 9 AM to 2 PM. This location serves the Carrollton community with dedicated staff ready to help with your lending needs.

At this Carrollton branch, you can apply for title loans, payday loans, and cash advances on your vehicle's equity. The team here understands the specific financial situations of Carrollton residents and can work with you on flexible terms. Call 214-483-3852 to speak with a loan specialist about your options.

If you're a Carrollton resident facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash need, this Loanstar location can process your application quickly, typically within hours. Bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and your vehicle's title if you're applying for a title loan. Loanstar focuses on fast, transparent lending to serve Carrollton families and individuals.
address: 2000 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

company_info.headquarters: 2000 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX 75006

pros: Loans available up to $10,000, higher ceiling than typical payday or emergency cash lenders
Founded in 1990 — over 35 years of operational history provides institutional stability
Licensed by Texas OCCC with publicly posted fee schedules for $600, $1,200, and $2,000 loan amounts
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Saturday hours (9AM–2PM) available, unlike many traditional lenders
Simple, three-item application requirement: vehicle, photo ID, and clear title
Online payment portal available in addition to in-store payment
Spanish-language website option for bilingual customers
Multiple Fort Worth-area locations provide convenient access across the metro
cons: Vehicle serves as collateral — failure to repay can result in repossession of the borrower's car
Title loans in Texas frequently carry triple-digit APRs; fee schedules are posted but prominent APR disclosures are not highlighted on location pages
Weekday hours limited to 10AM–6PM, narrower window than banks or online lenders
Clear title required — borrowers with any existing lien on their vehicle do not qualify
No mention of credit counseling or hardship programs if a borrower cannot repay
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear car title who need fast cash and do not qualify for traditional personal loans
Consumers with poor or no credit history who have been turned down elsewhere
Fort Worth or DFW-area residents who prefer in-person loan transactions over online-only lenders
Borrowers needing more than $1,000 but who lack the credit profile for an unsecured personal loan
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best suited for DFW-area consumers who own their vehicle outright, need cash quickly (up to $10,000), and cannot qualify for lower-cost credit options. The main caveat is the collateral risk inherent in all title loans — borrowers who miss payments risk losing their vehicle, making this product appropriate only for genuine emergencies after exhausting alternatives like credit union PALs, personal loans, or family assistance.
services: Car title loans (auto title loans) up to $10,000
In-store payment acceptance (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Multiple DFW-area branch locations for in-person service
meta_description: Loanstar Title Loans at 2000 E Belt Line Rd, Carrollton, TX. Quick title loans and cash advances.
